case_title: ANTHONY BOUGHTE et al VS. VELARDE, ALBERT AND ALFRED VELARDE AS TRUSTEE FOR

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF MICHELE M. STRATTON IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT RE INTEREST CALCULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARX, LYNN VON
